importExamples: import { Stack, H1, Text, Card, CardBody, Table, Stat } from 'routa/canvas';
promptRules: Import only from routa/canvas or react. Legacy cursor/canvas and @canvas-sdk imports still compile, but new canvases should use routa/canvas.
Prefer SDK primitives over raw div/span markup when possible.
Use useHostTheme() tokens instead of hardcoded colors.
If a symbol is not present in the generated SDK surface below, do not invent it.
